title: Aureline AI request-workspace contract
description: Boundary schema for the request_workspace_record, the request_workspace_working_set_record, the request_workspace_evidence_link_record, and the request_workspace_audit_event_record frozen in docs/ai/prompt_composer_contract.md. Every request_workspace_ref the context-assembly contract quotes (schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json prompt_composer_session_record / ai_context_assembly_record request_workspace_ref) resolves to exactly one request_workspace_record on this schema — the isolated staging scope an explain, review, patch, test-generation, inline-completion, refactor, background branch-agent, or support-replay AI flow accumulates work into before any turn is dispatched. The record binds one flow class to one scope filter, a closed set of working-set references (file slices, symbol sets, search-result packets, diagnostic sets, patch drafts, review threads, generated artifacts, terminal transcripts), the evidence packets the flow has minted, and a privacy / export posture that governs how the workspace appears in support bundles, admin exports, and legal-hold artifacts. Raw workspace paths, raw file bodies, raw URLs, raw terminal / log bodies, raw generated artifact bytes, raw request / response payloads, raw user-supplied text, and raw credential material never cross the RPC boundary; this schema carries ids, typed vocabulary, and structured postures only. The eventual AI / prompt-composer / review / patch crates' Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new flow_class, working_set_kind, privacy_export_posture_class, retention_stance_within_workspace_class, lifecycle_state_class, evidence_link_class, audit_event_id, or denial_reason is additive-minor and requires a request_workspace_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

request_workspace_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this AI request-workspace vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / evidence packets. Raw workspace paths, raw file bodies, raw URLs, raw terminal / log bodies, and raw credential material never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short human-readable sentence safe to show in request-workspace review, admin-reconciliation, support-export, and claim-manifest review surfaces.

flow_class.description: Frozen flow-class vocabulary. Every request workspace names exactly one flow_class so downstream scope / tool / data-class narrowing can fan out to the correct lane. disabled_no_flow is the canonical state for a row that exists but MUST NOT be cited; an assembly whose request_workspace_ref resolves to disabled_no_flow denies with workspace_disabled_no_invocation.

scope_filter_class.description: Scope-filter-class re-exported from schemas/runtime/execution_context.schema.json without modification (ADR-0009). The request workspace quotes one scope filter class; segments admitted to downstream assemblies MUST respect it.

working_set_kind.description: Frozen working-set-kind vocabulary. Every working_set_record names exactly one kind; raw file bodies, raw URLs, raw paths, raw transcripts, and raw payloads never appear — the record carries the typed kind and one opaque binding ref per entry.

privacy_export_posture_class.description: Frozen privacy / export posture vocabulary. Names how the request workspace appears in support bundles, admin exports, claim manifests, and legal-hold release artifacts. excluded_always_support_bundle / excluded_always_claim_manifest / excluded_always_legal_hold_release are the canonical deny states — a posture that attempts to re-admit to these denies with workspace_privacy_posture_widening_forbidden.

retention_stance_within_workspace_class.description: Frozen retention-stance-within-workspace vocabulary. Names how long the workspace's working-set bindings and evidence links survive on the device or at the broker. retention_policy_blocked is the canonical state when the admin policy refuses any retention; any admission attempt denies with workspace_retention_stance_forbidden.

lifecycle_state_class.description: Frozen lifecycle-state vocabulary for request workspaces. workspace_closed_* states are terminal; no new working-set bindings or evidence links may be minted against them. workspace_suspended_policy_change is the state a workspace enters on a policy-epoch roll; a fresh policy-context evaluation is required before it can return to workspace_open_active.

evidence_link_class.description: Frozen evidence-link-class vocabulary. Every evidence link names the typed kind of evidence it binds to the workspace. The underlying evidence records live on schemas/ai/evidence_packet.schema.json, schemas/ai/evidence_replay_packet.schema.json, and the governance claim-manifest schema.

isolation_posture_class.description: Frozen isolation-posture vocabulary. Names the scope across which the workspace's working-set bindings are shared. isolated_per_turn is the strongest isolation and is the default for an explain / inline-completion flow; shared_across_session_turns is admitted for patch / review / refactor flows that accumulate work across several turns.

data_class.description: Data-class vocabulary re-exported from schemas/ai/provider_registry.schema.json without modification. credential_handle_denied_always and secret_projection_denied_always remain on the denied-always set on every workspace; a workspace that attempts to admit them denies with workspace_data_class_denied_always_violation.

redaction_class.description: Redaction class re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011).

client_scope.description: Client-scope vocabulary re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011).

audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the request_workspace audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw paths, raw file bodies, raw URLs, raw terminal / log bodies, or raw credential material.

denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary. Denials fail closed; silent downgrade to a best-effort workspace admission, a best-effort working-set binding, or a best-effort evidence link is forbidden.

trust_state.description: ADR-0001 workspace-trust state at the moment the record was minted.

deployment_profile_class.description: Deployment-profile class re-exported from schemas/identity/policy_bundle.schema.json without modification.

execution_context_id.description: ADR-0009 execution-context id when the record was minted inside a live execution. Empty string when the record was minted outside an execution context.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under. Re-validated on every assembly citation; a policy-epoch roll suspends an open workspace and denies every pending dispatch with policy_epoch_rolled_invalidations.

entry_slot_index.description: Stable zero-based slot index within the working set. Reviewers reconstruct order from this field.

binding_ref.description: Opaque ref to the underlying binding (file slice id, symbol id, search-result-packet id, diagnostic set id, patch-draft id, review-thread id, generated-artifact id, terminal-transcript span id, etc.). Raw paths, raw file bodies, raw URLs, raw transcripts, and raw credential material never appear.

origin_mention_ref.description: Opaque ref to the prompt_composer_mention_record that brought this binding into the workspace, when the binding was introduced by a typed mention.

origin_attachment_ref.description: Opaque ref to the prompt_composer_attachment_record that brought this binding into the workspace, when the binding was introduced by an attachment.

data_classes.description: Data classes this binding contributes to the workspace. credential_handle_denied_always and secret_projection_denied_always MUST NOT appear here.

entry_summary.description: Short reviewable sentence describing the binding for support / claim-manifest review.

working_set_entry_record.description: One binding entry on a request-workspace working set. Every explain / review / patch / test / refactor / inline / background / replay flow accumulates a closed list of these entries before dispatch.

request_workspace_id.description: Stable id for the request workspace. request_workspace_ref on every prompt_composer_session_record and ai_context_assembly_record resolves to this id.

display_label.description: Short reviewable label the composer / admin / support surfaces render verbatim.

composer_session_refs.description: Opaque refs to the prompt_composer_session_records whose request_workspace_ref resolves here. Empty when the workspace is minted for a support-replay-only scenario.

composer_plan_refs.description: Opaque refs to every prompt_composer_plan_record (schemas/ai/prompt_composer_plan.schema.json) cited on any assembly that reads this workspace. Reviewers reconstruct which plan version governed which turn.

admitted_data_classes.description: Workspace-wide admitted data-class allowlist. credential_handle_denied_always and secret_projection_denied_always MUST NOT appear. Narrower than or equal to the effective policy bundle's admitted set.

working_set_entry_refs.description: Opaque refs to the request_workspace_working_set_records bound to this workspace. Binding is monotonic on an open workspace; unbinding is recorded on the audit stream.

evidence_link_refs.description: Opaque refs to the request_workspace_evidence_link_records the workspace has minted. Empty on a freshly opened workspace.

excluded_always_from_supports.description: Closed set of export sinks the workspace is always excluded from, regardless of the privacy_export_posture_class default. A workspace whose privacy_export_posture_class is excluded_always_* MUST list the matching sink here.

supersedes_request_workspace_ref.description: Opaque ref to the workspace this record supersedes. Required (non-null) when lifecycle_state_class = workspace_closed_superseded.

branch_agent_dispatch_refs.description: Opaque refs to background branch-agent dispatches anchored to this workspace. Every dispatch inherits this workspace's scope_filter, admitted data classes, privacy / export posture, and redaction class; a dispatch that widens any axis is non-conforming.

review_handoff_refs.description: Opaque refs to review-handoff packets this workspace fed. Reviewers read the handoff packets alongside this workspace to reconstruct the shell interaction-safety trace.

closed_at.description: Timestamp at which the workspace entered a terminal lifecycle state. Null while the workspace is open_active / open_idle / suspended / quarantined.

allOf.description: Every terminal lifecycle state requires a non-null closed_at.

request_workspace_record.description: The isolated request-workspace artifact. Explain, review, patch, test-generation, refactor, inline-completion, doc-generation, diagnostic-triage, background branch-agent, review-handoff, and support-replay AI flows each open a request_workspace_record, accumulate a closed set of working-set bindings and evidence links under one scope-filter / isolation / privacy / retention / redaction posture, and close it when the flow terminates. Raw paths, raw file bodies, raw URLs, raw terminal / log bodies, and raw credential material never cross this boundary.

entries.description: Ordered list of working-set entries. entry_slot_index values MUST be unique and start at 0.

working_set_summary.description: Short reviewable sentence summarising the working set's intent (for example 'patch-draft candidate files', 'explain-flow top 12 symbols', 'review-thread scope for PR'). Safe for support / claim-manifest review.

unbound_at.description: Timestamp at which this working set was unbound from the workspace. Null while the binding is live.

request_workspace_working_set_record.description: A working-set binding on a request workspace. One record per bound working set; a workspace MAY bind several (for example one for the patch-draft file slices, one for the review thread, and one for the generated test candidates).

evidence_ref.description: Opaque ref to the evidence record on the owning schema (ai_evidence_packet_record, ai_evidence_replay_packet_record, branch-agent evidence bundle, review-handoff evidence packet, or claim-manifest evidence record). Raw evidence bodies never appear.

request_workspace_evidence_link_record.description: One link between the workspace and an evidence record (assembly evidence packet, branch-agent evidence bundle, review-handoff evidence, replay evidence, support-replay evidence, claim-manifest evidence). Reviewers follow these links to reconstruct the evidence trail without opening the workspace's working-set bindings individually.

allOf.description: denial_reason MUST be non-null for request_workspace_denial_emitted events.

request_workspace_audit_event_record.description: Audit event emitted on the request_workspace audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw paths, raw file bodies, raw URLs, raw terminal / log bodies, or raw credential material.
